You'd think Netflix would learn after all that controversy with the treatment of contestants last year. Also, god, the original show has been ruined by its popularity. Or, more likely, it's capitalisation.

I feel bad for the person who made it; they probably never intended for this to happen to their baby. Because Season One was fantastic, and the other seasons were pretty decent. 

But all the 'content' and the 'gameshows', the stupid collaborations with every brand on this planet, the crazy amount of merch. It's completely muddied the message the show tries to give out. Because it feels disingenuous now, contradictory of itself. The uber wealthy make bank off this show, the same rich folk who would be the villains in the show.

Anyways, DROP A 15TH OF JULY STRANGER THINGS TRAILER! IT IS LITERALLY THE ONLY GOOD NETFLIX ORIGINAL! STRANGER THINGS MADE NETFLIX ORIGINALS! IT'S THE REASON PEOPLE FLOODED THE PLATFORM ALL THOSE YEARS AGO.
We love the duffers.
